message:
test(frankensqlite): add E2E migration cutover and rollback scenario harness (30 tests)

Covers full M0→M5 pipeline, rollback classifier decisions (immediate,
post-cutover, data-integrity-emergency tiers), playbook execution,
checkpoint monotonicity, manifest serde, and edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
